title: 3D TNT Minecart
description: Changes the 2D sprite item texture into a 3D item model!
body:
Transforms the handheld TNT Minecart item into a detailed 3D model, adding a touch of realism to your game and making TNT cart PvP more exciting and dynamic!

**Subscribe to my YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@OasisSucksAtMc?sub_confirmation=1
